_comment: Default underwriting thresholds for a standard UK BTL investor outside Zone 1-2 London. Copy this file, edit thresholds, and pass via --criteria to underwrite.py for client-specific criteria.

_notes.min_gross_yield_pct: 6% gross is the conventional UK BTL floor outside London. Drop to 3.5-4% for capital-growth London buyers. Push to 7-8% for yield-first investors in the North.
_notes.min_epc_grade: D is compliant today but exposed to MEES 2028/2030 rise to C. Set to C if the buyer wants zero retrofit risk.
_notes.min_comp_count: Fewer than 5 comps = thin market, median unreliable. Raise to 10 for large-value deals where signal confidence matters.
_notes.max_premium_over_median_pct: Asking prices above median by this much trigger a fail. Raise if the property has genuine differentiators (unusual size, extension, plot).
